name: HMR_chrIII_silent
description: HMR (Hidden Mating-type Right) silent cassette near the right telomere of chr III. ~2.7 kb storage cassette carrying a info in most lab strains, Sir-silenced. Near-identical to MATa and serves as donor for switching.
expected_copy_count: 1 active MAT + 2 silent (HML, HMR) cassettes, all on chr III
